title: Track + verify external reuse events
context: The project's Definition of Shipped requires verifiable external reuse, and M3's exit criteria require ≥ 1 named consumer using a release or ≥ 2 verifiable reuse events. Self-reported reuse does not count; evidence must be externally verifiable. This task is the Steward's responsibility: actively seek, discover, and record reuse events with external evidence links, and update the outcome ledger. Depends on release2-016 (a release to track reuse of).
objective: Identify, verify, and record ≥ 1 named consumer using a corpus release in their work (or ≥ 2 verifiable external reuse events), each with externally verifiable evidence — and commit the evidence to the outcome ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 named consumer (lab, advocacy org, NLP group) using a corpus release in their work is identified and confirmed, with external evidence (citation, public repo, published tool); OR at least 2 verifiable external reuse events are identified (Zenodo download + derivative, citation, public repo dependency).
Each reuse event is recorded with: consumer/reuser name, org, nature of reuse, date, and an externally verifiable evidence link (DOI, URL, or public repo path).
Self-reported reuse without external verification does not count; each event must be independently verifiable.
Events are committed to the outcome ledger (outcomes/<release-id>.json or equivalent) in a machine-readable format.
The Steward confirms the evidence is current and the links are accessible at the time of recording.
resources: pmc-cancer-release2-016 (second release to track reuse of)
pmc-cancer-partner-011 (first consumer evidence to follow up on)
PLAN.md (Success metrics — verifiable external reuse events; Sustainability — Outcome tracking)
Zenodo usage statistics and derivative tracking
output: A committed outcome ledger update (outcomes/<release-id>.json) recording ≥ 1 named consumer or ≥ 2 verifiable reuse events, each with external evidence links and reuse description.
